title: Sake's Structures
description: A mod that adds a bunch of structures to your Minecraft world
body:
# **Welcome to Sake's Structures & Dungeons!**
This mod's purpose is to bring life upon your Minecraft by adding a bunch of structures.
Currently, only 14 structures are present, however I plan on adding more in future.

Since updating it to 1.20.1, I am going to gravitate towards puzzle/parkour/traps-oriented structures. But I won't forget ambient ones either!


## Important to mention: Prevention Field Generators
![A Prevention Field Generator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a01e31c9c4bda5ab78d4a0a822e23b79336011a.png)
These things prevent players from placing or breaking any blocks. However, you can destroy these generators by right clicking them.



### The mod is made with MCreator.


### **You are allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!**
